title: Does this look like Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Does this look like Asuka?             Quote Post by Number 44 » Wed Nov 18, 2009 8:55 pm I've not said one thing correct since I've joined, but.... Do you think this looks like Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Nov 18, 2009 8:58 pm No.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 18, 2009 9:03 pm Yes, sort of.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Nov 18, 2009 9:05 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Yes, sort of.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Nov 18, 2009 9:21 pm No, nothing like her.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Nov 18, 2009 10:14 pm aside from being unusually joyous, sort of not really, but yes really at the same time now..all we need is a full color pic & to ultimately decide

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Nov 18, 2009 10:17 pm she looks a little like her.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Nov 18, 2009 10:17 pm If she was in an 80's anime I guess

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Nov 18, 2009 10:41 pm It looks like Asuka only in the way it would look like her if an artist was trying to draw her from memory after seeing just one episode with her in it. There are similarities, but even the similarities are different in ways that separate this figure from Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Wed Nov 18, 2009 11:24 pm A lot of anime characters look alike. It kinda looks like Asuka. It was bound to happen, and it will happen again.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Nov 19, 2009 12:11 pm What is this from and who drew it?

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Thu Nov 19, 2009 4:38 pm I can't believe people are actually denying that looks like Asuka. It looks just like her. Also, Asuka has been joyous before in Evangelion. Hell, some of you are forgetting that she had the same emotion like that near Kaji at times. But it isn't a ripoff, probably just a coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Nov 19, 2009 4:47 pm Looks a bit like Asuka, only drawn in the style of Megazone 23 /mid-late 80's. Captain_Morgan wrote: A lot of anime characters look alike.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Nov 19, 2009 4:48 pm But it isn't a ripoff, probably just a coincidence.

[]: Re: Does this look like Asuka?             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Nov 19, 2009 5:06 pm Number 44 wrote: I've not said one thing correct since I've joined, but.... Do you think this looks like Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Thu Nov 19, 2009 8:21 pm

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Nov 19, 2009 8:27 pm That looks.... interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Nov 19, 2009 9:04 pm I BURSTED into laughter at the title. So unexpected.

[]: Re: Does this look like Asuka?             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Nov 19, 2009 9:15 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: if you want to see another example of that, watch burst angel, the three main characters look like Shinji, Asuka, and Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Nov 19, 2009 9:17 pm I thought it was just from some regular old fighting game. I guess in a way I was right.
summary:
[]: Does this look like Asuka?             Quote Post by Number 44 » Wed Nov 18, 2009 8:55 pm I've not said one thing correct since I've joined, but.... Do you think this looks like Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Nov 18, 2009 8:58 pm No.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 18,
